data.title: Implement REBASE_HEAD filtering in record-test-status.sh
data.description:
## Description

Add REBASE_HEAD detection after existing MERGE_HEAD block (~line 236) in plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh. Mirror the MERGE_HEAD pattern: detect REBASE_HEAD, read onto from rebase-merge/onto or rebase-apply/onto, read orig-head from rebase state dir, compute merge base, filter staged files. Must filter identically to pre-commit-test-gate.sh during rebase (same file set). Use git rev-parse --git-dir. Fail-open.

## TDD Requirement
The 2 RED tests from task 463f-a649 turn GREEN.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] REBASE_HEAD detection in record-test-status.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'REBASE_HEAD' plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: ! grep -q 'record-test-status.*\[test_record_status_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
